chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Rev. Application No.131 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection at A 2.For hg of case 19.01.2026. Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Additional Prosecutor General. Learned APG does not press this revision application as according to him trial has processed and has reached at advance stage. Accordingly, this revision application is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
